title: Polymath Plan frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block of a docs/plans/<slug>.md authored by polymath-planning:write-plan. The Markdown body stays free-form so the skill can structure it (What / Why / Approach / Work breakdown / Risks / Verification / Out of scope). Strong mustPass gates (`artifactValid`, `artifactSchemaStrict`) consume this schema to reject hollow Plan stubs.

target.description: Optional target date for plan completion (ISO-8601). When present, strong gates can warn when the date is in the past with status still `draft` or `accepted`.

review_date.description: Optional next-review date so the plan does not become stale silently. Polymath-core's queue.json can be primed from this field.

prd_link.description: Path or URL to the originating PRD (when the plan executes one).

adr_links.description: Paths or URLs to ADRs that constrain this plan.
